name: Planet Hollywoods Captain Crunch Chicken
recipeInstructions:
Coarsely grind or crush the two cereals and set aside. Beat the egg with milk and set aside. Stir together the flour, onion powder, garlic powder, and black pepper. Set this aside also. Dip the chicken pieces into the seasoned flour mixture, coating well, then shake off the excess. Dip into the egg wash, coating well, then dip into the cereal mixture, coating well.
Heat oil in a large heavy skillet to 325 degrees Fahrenheit. Carefully drop the coated chicken tenders into the hot oil and cook until golden brown and fully cooked, about 3 to 5 minutes depending on size. Using a slotted spoon, remove from the oil and drain on paper towels. Serve immediately with creole mustard sauce.
